🧠Architecture Summary
UNIVARIATE LSTM
Input(1) → LSTM(32h) → Dense(1) | ~5K params | seq=3
MULTIVARIATE LSTM
Input(9) → LSTM(48h) → Dense(1) | ~10K params | seq=3
ENCODER-DECODER LSTM
Enc(1→24h) + Dec(1→24h→1) | ~6K params | 3→2 steps
TRAINING CONFIG
Adam optimiser · Xavier init · Grad clip=1.0 · 80 epochs · 60/20/20 split · 1,000 players × 5 seasons

🔮Architecture Flow
ENCODER
S1 → S2 → S3
LSTM(24h)
Context
h, c
DECODER
S4★ → S5★
LSTM(24h)
Output
2 steps
Why R² is low: With only 5 seasons, the encoder sees just 3 and must project 2 future windows. Autoregressive decoding compounds errors at each step. 10+ seasons of data would significantly improve performance.

Key finding: Adding 8 extra features (sentiment, attractiveness, age decay) reduced MAE by 62.2% and RMSE by 43.2%.
